Description.English:
A foul-smelling compound that can be harvested from the Gutrot Flower, or less desirably from the faecal matter of some species.

Creatures can be fed to encourage the formation and deposition of faecium crystals.
Description.SimplifiedChinese:
一种发臭的化合物，可从烂肠花中或从某些物种的粪便中收获。

可喂养生物来促进它们排泄屎球菌晶体。
Description.TraditionalChinese:
散發惡臭的化合物，可從爛腸花上採集；另一種比較倒胃口的方式，是從某些物種的糞便中取得。

餵食生物可促使其生成屎菌水晶。

PinObjectiveTip.English:
Faecium is a nitrogen-rich organic material harvested from the dung of many large animals. Feed animals to increase faecium production.
It is possible to grow faecium given the right environment and correct host plant. Seek advice from an Agricultural Specialist.
PinObjectiveTip.SimplifiedChinese:
屎球菌是一种富含氮元素的有机材料，能从许多大型动物的粪便中采集到。饲养动物来提升屎球菌的产量。
可以通过在适当的环境下种植恰当的寄主植物来培养出屎球菌。具体建议可咨询农业专家。
PinObjectiveTip.TraditionalChinese:
屎菌是一種從大型動物的排泄物所採收的有機材料，氮含量高。餵食動物即可提升屎菌產量。
有合適的環境與宿主植物，也可種植屎菌。尋求農業專家的建議。

PinObjectiveMessage.English:
Harvest from the dung of many large animals. Feed animals to increase faecium production
This material can be farmed within a base with the aid of an Agricultural Specialist
PinObjectiveMessage.SimplifiedChinese:
采集自各类大型生物留下的粪便。喂食生物以提高屎球菌产量
可以在农业专家的帮助下于基地中种植这种资源
PinObjectiveMessage.TraditionalChinese:
採集自多種大型動物的排泄物。餵食動物可提升屎菌產量
借助農業專家的力量即可在基地培養這種材料
